description_long: This trash bin features a rectangular, vertical design with a robust metal frame and horizontal wooden slats forming its main body. The top is covered by a flat, overhanging metal lid supported by four corner posts, leaving an open gap for depositing waste. The front panel includes a small, square black plate and a round button or lock, suggesting a door for access or maintenance. The wood panels are medium brown with visible grain, contrasting with the dark, matte metal frame and lid. The bin appears sturdy and weather-resistant, suitable for outdoor urban environments such as parks or sidewalks. Its overall appearance is modern and functional, blending industrial and natural materials.
description: A modern, rectangular trash bin with a metal frame, wooden slats, and a flat overhanging metal lid. Features a front access panel with a small black plate and round button.
description_view_0: Front view showing the access panel with a black plate and round button, framed by metal and wooden slats.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the continuous wooden slats and the overhanging metal lid, with no visible access panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying uninterrupted wooden slats and the flat metal lid, with no signage or access features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the wooden slats and the overhanging lid.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: small black plate on front, otherwise unmarked
